title: psacalium langlassei
intro: Psacalium langlassei, also known as Langlasse's psacalium, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Psacalium langlassei include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
